sections.paragraph:
Original: נבא

Transliteration: nâbâ'

Phonetic: naw-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to prophesy
    1. (Niphal)
      1. to prophesy
        1. under influence of divine spirit
        2. of false prophets
    2. (Hithpael)
      1. to prophesy
        1. under influence of divine spirit
        2. of false prophets

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1277

Part(s) of speech: Verb
